scripts.dev: uv run uvicorn contoso_finance.main:app --reload --reload-dir src --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 --app-dir src
scripts.build: echo 'Python server — no build step required'
scripts.lint: uv run ruff check src/ tests/
scripts.db:reset: uv run alembic downgrade base && uv run alembic upgrade head
